name: Factual Rigor
description: Assesses accuracy, verifiability, and resistance to hallucination

factual_accuracy.description: Are the specific claims, statistics, dates, and names in the report accurate and verifiable? Penalize fabricated figures or events.

claim_precision.description: Are claims appropriately qualified (hedged when uncertain, definitive when well-established)? Penalize overconfident assertions on contested topics.

source_grounding.description: Does the report reference recognizable, credible sources (named institutions, studies, publications) rather than vague attribution?

internal_consistency.description: Are statements within the report free of contradictions? Do conclusions follow logically from the evidence presented?
